blockers.description: Data persistence uses SwiftData ModelContext.save() with silent try? failure. No atomic write, no backup, no corruption detection. Crash mid-save = data loss with no recovery.
blockers.attack_scenario: User editing 500-node mind map, system crashes mid-auto-save. SwiftData store left partially written. Relaunch shows corrupted data or empty store. No backup exists. All 500 nodes permanently lost.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Atomic write via FileManager.copyItem to temp then rename, (2) Auto-backup before every save to .backup directory, (3) SwiftData store integrity check on launch, (4) Recovery UI: 'Corrupted save found, restoring from backup', (5) Replace all try? with explicit try with error propagation to UI.

audit_trail.detail: FATAL: No atomic writes, no backup, silent save failures
Architecture survivable: resolution documented, FATAL addressed via Implement: (1) Atomic write via FileManager.copyIt...
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Atomic write via FileManager.copyItem to temp then rename, (2) Au...

blockers.description: No viewport culling. All nodes rendered regardless of visibility. At 1000+ nodes: O(n) render with ~1000 SwiftUI views + ~999 connections. At 10000+ nodes app becomes completely unresponsive.
blockers.attack_scenario: User pastes brain-dump of 5000 nodes. App becomes unresponsive. Every pan/zoom triggers 5000 view updates. UI freezes 10+ seconds. User must force-quit and edit SQLite directly to recover.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Viewport culling - only NodeView for nodes intersecting visibleRect, (2) Spatial index (R-tree) for O(log n) viewport queries, (3) Connection culling - only draw connections with both endpoints visible, (4) Offscreen node placeholder views for non-visible nodes, (5) Target: 60fps with 10,000 nodes.

audit_trail.detail: FATAL: No viewport culling, O(n) rendering, unusable at scale
Architecture survivable: resolution documented, FATAL addressed via Implement: (1) Viewport culling - only NodeView fo...
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Viewport culling - only NodeView for nodes intersecting visibleRe...

blockers.description: Keyboard navigation (arrow keys) has no breadcrumb trail, no depth indicator. Collapsed nodes silently skip entire subtrees during navigation. No navigation history.
blockers.attack_scenario: User collapses 50-node branch, uses arrow keys. Navigation silently skips entire subtree. User believes they navigate to sibling when they reach distant cousin. Performs bulk operation on wrong subtree.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Breadcrumb trail in status bar showing root→...→current path, (2) Navigation history with Cmd+[ back support, (3) Visual highlight of parent chain during navigation, (4) Audible feedback when crossing collapsed boundary.

audit_trail.detail: HIGH: No breadcrumb, collapsed nodes silently skipped
Architecture survivable: resolution documented, HIGH addressed via Implement: (1) Breadcrumb trail in status bar show...
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Breadcrumb trail in status bar showing root→...→current path, (2)...

blockers.description: SwiftData store at ~/Library/Application Support/myMindMap/ has world-readable permissions. No sandbox, no encryption, no NSFileProtection. Any local user/malware can read all mind map content.
blockers.attack_scenario: Malware with current user privileges reads ~/Library/Application Support/myMindMap/ and extracts all mind map content including sensitive business data, personal notes, IP.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Enable App Sandbox with com.apple.security.files.user-selected.read-write, (2) NSFileProtectionComplete on SwiftData store, (3) Document expected file permissions (700), (4) Data Protection entitlement. Note: For document-based app, sandbox requires using Security-Scoped Bookmarks for file access.

audit_trail.detail: HIGH: No sandbox, no encryption, world-readable store
Architecture survivable: resolution documented, HIGH addressed via Implement: (1) Enable App Sandbox with com.apple.s...
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Enable App Sandbox with com.apple.security.files.user-selected.re...

blockers.description: SwiftData ModelContext is not thread-safe. modelContext stored as non-isolated property, used in save() from multiple contexts. Auto-save timer fires on background thread while user edits on main thread. Data races possible.
blockers.attack_scenario: Auto-save fires on background thread while user edits node text on main thread. Both write to same MindMapNode. SwiftData throws CrossActorViolation. Data inconsistency. Possible crash with 'concurrent modification'.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Annotate all SwiftData operations @MainActor, (2) Use ModelContext only on main actor, (3) Move auto-save to main actor via Task { @MainActor in }, (4) Add actor-isolated wrapper for MindMapViewModel, (5) Test with -XactorIsolatedChecksStrict enabled.

audit_trail.detail: HIGH: ModelContext not thread-safe, possible data races
Architecture survivable: resolution documented, HIGH addressed via Implement: (1) Annotate all SwiftData operations @...
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Annotate all SwiftData operations @MainActor, (2) Use ModelContex...

blockers.description: No SwiftData abstraction layer. If Apple deprecates/changes SwiftData, migration requires complete persistence rewrite with no defined path.
blockers.attack_scenario: Apple announces SwiftData deprecation. No abstraction layer means complete rewrite of persistence layer. No migration test suite exists.
blockers.resolution: Implement: Repository pattern abstraction (protocol MindMapRepository) over SwiftData. SwiftData implementation (MindMapRepositoryImpl) injected via Environment. Alternative (SQLite.swift) documented as fallback.

audit_trail.detail: MEDIUM: No dependency abstraction over SwiftData
Confirmed: Implement: Repository pattern abstraction (protocol MindMapRepository) over Swif...

blockers.description: User input in node text stored without sanitization. No length limits. Exported files (JSON/Markdown) could contain injection payloads. Extremely long node text could cause memory exhaustion.
blockers.attack_scenario: Node text: '<script>alert(1)</script>' exported to JSON. Another user imports and renders without sanitization causing XSS. 100KB node text causes memory exhaustion.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Max 10,000 char limit on node text enforced at NodeViewModel, (2) Sanitize HTML/script content before export, (3) Escape all output in export formats, (4) Test with payloads: '<script>', '\x00', unicode bidi.

audit_trail.detail: MEDIUM: No input sanitization, no length limits
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Max 10,000 char limit on node text enforced at NodeViewModel, (2)...

blockers.description: Missing keyboard shortcuts for common operations: zoom 100%, collapse all, expand all, reset view, select all, copy/cut/paste nodes, toggle grid.
blockers.attack_scenario: Power user with 200-node mind map must use mouse for node color changes, cannot collapse all with keyboard, cannot select all nodes to move together.
blockers.resolution: Implement missing shortcuts: Cmd+1 (zoom 100%), Cmd+Shift+C (collapse all), Cmd+Shift+E (expand all), Cmd+Shift+0 (reset view), Cmd+A (select all), Cmd+C/X/V (copy/cut/paste nodes). Document in Help menu shortcuts window (Cmd+?).

audit_trail.detail: MEDIUM: Incomplete keyboard shortcut coverage
Confirmed: Implement missing shortcuts: Cmd+1 (zoom 100%), Cmd+Shift+C (collapse all), Cmd+...

blockers.description: Dark mode is static toggle, not automatic. App does not observe NSApp.appearanceDidChangeNotification. Hardcoded hex colors don't adapt to macOS appearance.
blockers.attack_scenario: User works in evening. macOS auto-switches to dark at 8PM. myMindMap stays light with harsh white background. User must manually toggle. Eye strain results.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Observe NSApp.appearanceDidChangeNotification, (2) Auto-switch based on NSApp.effectiveAppearance, (3) Use dynamic colors: Color(nsColor: .windowBackgroundColor), (4) Animate transition over 300ms.

audit_trail.detail: MEDIUM: No automatic dark mode following macOS appearance
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Observe NSApp.appearanceDidChangeNotification, (2) Auto-switch ba...

blockers.description: Vague acceptance criteria: 'beautiful', 'distraction-free', 'auto-sizing font' (no bounds), 'thin italics' (no pt size), 'colorful thin lines' (no hex), 'auto-zoom to fit' (no trigger/padding/animation), 'central node selected' (no visual spec).
blockers.attack_scenario: Designer A implements 'beautiful' with neon colors and animations. Designer B implements 'distraction-free' with muted grays. QA cannot verify 'auto-zoom' because no one defined 'fit'.
blockers.resolution: Quantify in SPEC.md: (1) 'auto-sizing font' = 12pt min, 24pt max, depth 0=24pt, depth 1+=12-18pt by length, (2) 'thin italics' = 10pt SF Pro Italic, (3) 'colorful' = 8 distinct HSB hues, (4) 'thin lines' = 1.5pt stroke, (5) 'auto-zoom' = on new/open, 50pt padding, 300ms ease-in-out, (6) 'selected' = 2pt blue (#007AFF) ring.

audit_trail.detail: MEDIUM: Vague acceptance criteria need measurable definitions
Confirmed: Quantify in SPEC.md: (1) 'auto-sizing font' = 12pt min, 24pt max, depth 0=24pt, ...

blockers.description: No action throttling on Cmd+N. Each press synchronously triggers createNewMindMap() inserting into context and saving. Rapid 50x presses creates 50 MindMap objects with no debounce.
blockers.attack_scenario: User holds Cmd+N accidentally. 50+ mind maps created. Must delete one by one. UI freezes briefly. SwiftData lock contention.
blockers.resolution: Implement: (1) Debounce Cmd+N to max 1 action per 500ms, (2) Throttled action queue in MindMapViewModel, (3) Confirmation dialog if creating more than 3 mind maps in 5 seconds, (4) Limit max 10 unsaved documents in memory.

audit_trail.detail: MEDIUM: No action throttling on rapid Cmd+N
Confirmed: Implement: (1) Debounce Cmd+N to max 1 action per 500ms, (2) Throttled action qu...

blockers.description: No network calls currently. Export menu stubs have no network code. Future cloud sync without certificate pinning, auth, or request signing would be vulnerable.
blockers.attack_scenario: Developer adds cloud sync without security review. Attacker MITM to inject malicious content into sync stream.
blockers.resolution: Document prohibition on network features until security review. If added: TLS pinning, OAuth 2.0, HMAC request signing, schema validation, network security config.

audit_trail.detail: LOW: No network calls but future sync could be vulnerable
Confirmed: Document prohibition on network features until security review. If added: TLS pi...
